title: Inconsistent return type between find_route helper and public lookup
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/routing.c:166-175, 235-248

The internal `find_route` helper returns `struct lichen_rpl_route *` (mutable), while the public `lichen_rpl_routing_table_lookup` returns `const struct lichen_rpl_route *`.

While the current usage is correct (internal code modifies routes, public API is read-only), this creates a const-correctness inconsistency. The internal function at line 624 casts away const implicitly:

```c
struct lichen_rpl_route *route = find_route(&dm->routing_table, target);
if (route != NULL) {
    route->path_lifetime = lifetime;  // modifies via non-const pointer
```

Suggested improvement: Add a private `find_route_mut` for internal modification, or document the design decision.
